description_long: This bungalow complex features three distinct single-story structures connected by paved walkways, each set on its own geometric platform. The main bungalow has a light-colored exterior with a gabled roof, a visible porch, and large windows facing the central courtyard. Adjacent to it is a secondary building with a dark, hipped roof and minimal fenestration, likely serving as a garage or utility space. The third structure is a rounded, modern pavilion with a flat roof and expansive glass, possibly a sunroom or lounge. The outdoor areas are landscaped with small palm trees and include a pool adjacent to the main bungalow. The overall layout is open and communal, with clear separation between living, utility, and leisure spaces.
description: A light-toned bungalow complex with three interconnected buildings, including a main house with a gabled roof, a dark-roofed utility building, and a modern pavilion, all set among landscaped walkways and a pool.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the entire complex from above, highlighting the geometric layout, the main bungalow with its porch, the dark-roofed building, and the pool area.
description_view_1: View 1 emphasizes the main bungalow's gabled roof and porch, with the modern pavilion and landscaping visible in the background.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a clear look at the dark-roofed utility building and the rounded pavilion, with the main bungalow partially visible.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the rear of the dark-roofed building and the side of the main bungalow, showing the connecting walkways and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and large front-facing windows
